books.title: Project Hail Mary
books.author: Andy Weir
books.desc: A lone astronaut wakes up on a spaceship with no memory and must save humanity from extinction.
books.longDesc: Ryland Grace is the sole survivor of a desperate space mission. As his memory slowly returns, he realizes he is humanity’s last hope against a mysterious cosmic threat. Blending science, humor, and survival, this novel explores intelligence, friendship, and sacrifice on an interstellar scale.

books.title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
books.author: Robert T. Kiyosaki
books.desc: A personal finance classic that teaches how money really works through two different father figures.
books.longDesc: Rich Dad Poor Dad contrasts the financial philosophies of two father figures—one rich and one poor. The book challenges traditional beliefs about money, work, and investing, encouraging readers to build assets, think independently, and achieve financial freedom through financial literacy.
